description:
"卩ㄥ卂ㄚ 爪ㄚ 山卂ㄚ!"

looks like you found silly mr fox.

Scene 2

-RUN-

ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇ

You turned your computer on. Everything was.. Normal. Has Datagen decided to calm down? Maybe... You were about to open up a application until you heard a mechanical beep. At first you didn't think much of it untill it played again...

again

and again.

It almost sounded like counting. It stopped once the tenth beep played. A pixelated shadowy figure appeared before becoming one in color, showing Datagens character. a ticking seemed to play inside the PC in the background like a clock. You get out of chair, stepping to the side, crossing your arms. Datagens character still stared straight ahead until the screen refreshes with Datagen staring right at you, his artificial eyes narrowed. it almost freaked you out. A web of cracks started to form on the monitor, a glass cracking noise coming with it, slow, as if it was teasing you. After a long, deafening moment. The screen shattered.

Wires slither out of the computer slowly as the sound of mechanical clicking like a wrench seemed to come out the computer before- In that void of broken, shattered glass- you make out something familiar. Datagen. And hes staring directly at you. His eyes are dead of emotion, robotic, but somehow seem to have an eerie feeling to it.

Your frozen in place for a long time. Until your legs move before you think and you shot of running.

___________________________________________

What the hell just happened?
creator: IvansLover
